summary: Completed testing of Iteration 47 - Step 4 Content CMS Management & Button Alignment. All 7 backend API tests passed. Frontend features verified: right-aligned buttons on enrollment form, two tabs in CMS (Form Fields & Step 4 Content), Step 4 content editor with title input and rich text description, save functionality working.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 47 Step 4 Content CMS and button alignment fully tested. CMS has two tabs: 'Form Fields' (existing drag-and-drop) and 'Step 4 Content' (new title/description editor). Enrollment form buttons are right-aligned with justify-end class.

backend_apis.GET /api/public/enrollment-content/step4: PASS - Returns title and description (defaults if not set)
backend_apis.GET /api/admin/enrollment-fields: PASS - Returns all fields with auth

frontend_enrollment_buttons.justify-end class: PASS - Buttons container has justify-end for right alignment
frontend_enrollment_buttons.Save button position: PASS - Located at x=1213 (right side of 1920px viewport)

cms_enrollment_tabs.Form Fields tab: PASS - data-testid='tab-fields', shows field list with drag-and-drop
cms_enrollment_tabs.Rich text editor: PASS - Description field uses RichTextEditor component
cms_enrollment_tabs.Success toast: PASS - 'Step 4 content updated' message appears after save

step4_content_display.step4Content state: PASS - State populated with title and description from API
